name: FRACTYL HEALTH, INC.
business: Fractyl Health, Inc. is a metabolic therapeutics company developing medical devices and biopharmaceutical products. Its lead product candidate, Revita, is an investigational medical device for hydrothermal ablation of the duodenal mucosa, intended for maintenance of weight loss after discontinuation of GLP-1-based therapy. The company also has preclinical gene therapy candidates, Rejuva, for metabolic diseases.

exposures.sentence: We are currently in clinical-stage development of Revita, which is an investigational medical device, and are conducting preclinical and expect to initiate clinical development of our Rejuva candidate RJVA-001 along with a device delivery system, which together with the gene therapy candidate, we anticipate will be regulated as a combination biologic-device in the U.S.
fund the continued preclinical and clinical development of our Rejuva gene therapy candidate RJVA-001

Our information technology systems, or those of any of our CROs, manufacturers, third-party service providers, other contractors, consultants, collaborators or potential future collaborators, may fail or suffer security or data privacy breaches or other unauthorized or improper access to, use of, or destruction of our proprietary or confidential data, employee data, or personal data, which could result in additional costs, loss of revenue, significant liabilities, harm to our brand and material disruption of our operations.
